Gyeon Quartz Q?OM?OPOLISH?Ois an effective medium polish, designed to leave a hologram-free, deep glossy finish on all paint types. This polish can be used as a single-step for paintwork that only require a little attention or as a second step from Q2M Compound.

Q2M Polish works well on all paint types including the softer Japanese paintwork and will remove any medium imperfections leaving a high gloss finish ready for application of your Gyeon Quartz coating.
